title: Bilimci73's PvP Overlay
description: Default edit PvP and Vanilla texture pack.
body:
# This Pack For PvP and Vanilla Game Play
## Pack Features:
- Small Shield and small shield holding
- Small Fire (for better visibility)
- Smooth Crystal Texture
- Redstone tweaks
- Visible trapwire
- Small items in hand
- Small Totem Pop
- Dark Gui
- 32x smooth font
- Small sword and mace holding model
- Big ground items:
  - Totem
  - Golden apple and Enchanted golden apple
  - Elytra
  - Mace
  - Diamond and Netherite Sword
- Visible powder snow
- Clean water
- Old armor enchant glint
- Removed some particles for better visibility
- Pumpkin blur removed
- Fishing hook smalled (so you can see better)
- Visible Ore
- Reduced explosion sound
- No block breaking particles
- Some texture fix
### And More...

<sub>This pack is licensed under CC BY 4.0.
Credit is required by the license, but I won’t strictly enforce it.
A small “by bilimci73” is always appreciated. Thank You ❤️</sub>
